title: Ilumina DNA Prep Part 1 - Tagment DNA
author: Opentrons

steps.title: Explanation of complex parameters below
steps.instruction: Explanation of complex parameters below: * `Number of samples`: Specify the number of samples for this run. * `P300 Tip Start Column on Slot 8 (1-12)`: One column of the 200ul tip rack will be used per run. Specify which column to pick up tips from for this run. * `P20 Multi-Channel GEN2 Mount`: Specify which side (left or right) the P20 multi channel pipette is mounted. * `P300 Multi Channel GEN2 Mount`: Specify which side (left or right) the P300 multi channel pipette is mounted.

steps.title: 10ul of water is added to...
steps.instruction: 10ul of water is added to each column, up to the number specified, in the empty plate in slot 3.

steps.title: DNA is premixed for 10 repetitions...
steps.instruction: DNA is premixed for 10 repetitions before 5ul is transferred to the plate on slot 3 for each column containing water.

steps.title: Mastermix is added to water/DNA mixture,...
steps.instruction: Mastermix is added to water/DNA mixture, with a premix of mastermix step for every 3 columns that are transferred.
